blockingIssues.description: Compacting hook resolves session root from context.directory before context.worktree, which can miss active sessions when directory is a subfolder.
tests/cross-area/pack-invariants.test.ts hardcodes machine-specific absolute repository paths, making the test non-portable.
importBuiltPlugin() reuses a fixed ESM URL, so the resume-flow test does not actually reload dist/index.js and cannot validate reload behavior.
package.json scripts.check omits bun run bench even though final-gate feature/contract wording requires check to include bench.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to document post-M6 tool metadata behavior (context.metadata callback side effect + string execute returns).
Added explicit session-root precedence guidance (worktree before directory, including hooks) to prevent compacting-hook root-resolution regressions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a mission-level portability rule that tests must not use machine-specific absolute repository paths and must resolve paths relative to worktree/import.meta.dir.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m6-pack-invariants-script review found /Users/vriesd absolute paths in tests/cross-area/pack-invariants.test.ts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the definition of bun run check across feature text, validation contract, and package.json (explicitly decide whether bench is part of check).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m6-final-check review found feature/contract require bench in check while package.json scripts.check omits bun run bench.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require orientation reads to include .factory/library/environment.md and add objective procedure-compliance checks before claiming followedProcedure=true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m6-pack-invariants-script and m6-release-smoke-tests reviews reported portability/procedure misses that environment guidance and stricter compliance checks would likely prevent.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify test-first expectations for release-metadata/doc-only features where validation is primarily file/package inspection rather than new behavior tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m6-version-changelog-readme review identified friction from strictly requiring red-test-first flow on documentation/release metadata scope.

rejectedObservations.observation: Change .factory/services.yaml format_check command due Biome --check inconsistency observation.
Add AGENTS guidance about verification-step reference ordering.
Directly mutate validation-contract evidence regex for VAL-RELEASE-001 in this validator run.
rejectedObservations.reason: out-of-scope for apply-now changes in this pass
